_comment: BOREAS — Nifl Town (gym 9, Ice) leader intro. A per-leader copy of the Cicada scene (leader_intro can't carry a name title), reusing the SAME relative+facingFrame+endBack:7 geometry VERBATIM so gym/engage_nifl_leader still opens the battle from the endBack:7 stage-back. Camera path is leader-agnostic: pull up over the challenger's shoulder framing Boreas, a TIGHT ZOOM-IN dolly to his face (the z:-8.5 -> z:-6.8 close holds mirror starter_reveal's push-in), cross high for a side profile, then drop home. Ice theme swapped onto the shared cue skeleton: glass/powder-snow breaks and snow steps for the White Silence reveal, snowflake + snowball particles anchored ON the leader by uuid (particles land on Boreas at the zoom instead of Cicada's rough challenger-facing guess). tick 190 keeps the universal levelup swell. IN-WORLD TUNING MAY BE NEEDED: air-verify the zoom-keyframe framing and particle density at the real Nifl arena; endBack 7 MUST match so the post-scene battle opens correctly.

cues.command: execute at cc1f6d46-48c1-42f2-bf46-a07194593733 run particle minecraft:snowflake ~ ~1 ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
execute at cc1f6d46-48c1-42f2-bf46-a07194593733 run particle minecraft:item_snowball ~ ~1 ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
